steps.name: opa-engine
steps.summary: OpaEvaluator (orchestrator/gate/opa.py) — subprocess OPA CLI, graceful skip when not installed, 5 unit tests

steps.name: rego-policies
steps.summary: 4 Rego policies (PCI critical, secrets, high-severity threshold, IaC network segmentation) + 6 tests (3 structural + 3 OPA integration w/ skip)

steps.name: gate-integration
steps.summary: CombinedGateEvaluator (YAML+OPA two-layer gate) + CLI/demo integration + 5 unit tests

steps.name: bedrock-live
steps.summary: Bedrock live test script (scripts/test_bedrock.py), enhanced error handling + timing/token logging in BedrockClient, AI-mode demo output (narrative/insights/recommendations), envelope contract fixtures

steps.name: defectdojo-compose
steps.summary: Docker Compose (6 services: django/nginx/celery-beat/celery-worker/postgres/redis), Makefile docker targets, 4 unit tests validating YAML/services/volume/localhost binding

steps.name: defectdojo-client
steps.summary: DefectDojoClient (orchestrator/integrations/defectdojo.py) — urllib-based REST client, finding_to_defectdojo converter with hash dedup + control_id tags, CLI sync command, 4 unit + 4 contract tests

steps.name: evidence-defectdojo
steps.summary: EvidenceExporter extended with DefectDojo as preferred data source (JSONL fallback), assess command auto-syncs to DD, demo shows DD status, 3 unit tests
